meta.name: Risk and Dependency Tracker
meta.description: Collect risks and dependencies from team members weekly, score them for probability and impact, flag critical items, and send a consolidated risk report.

parameters.content:
## 17 — Risk and Dependency Tracker

**Required:**
- RISK_SHEET_ID: sheet with columns: id, title, type (risk|dependency), probability (1-5), impact (1-5), owner, mitigation, status, due_date
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Critical threshold:** RISK_CRITICAL_SCORE (default: 15, max 25)
**Schedule:** Every Thursday at 09:00

**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: ⚠️ Risk Report {{ $json.week }}: {{ $json.critical_count }} critical, {{ $json.high_count }} high
